item.title: Prepare for an educational dunk on Cancun Ted Cruz in 3... 2... 1...
item.description: “Which slaves built Chicago?” — Ted Cruz Welcome to History 101: Things They Forgot to Teach You in School. Yes, Senator Cruz, you should sit in the front row. Lesson one: Chicago’s founder wasn’t a rugged white pioneer. It was Jean Baptiste Point du Sable, a free Black man from Haiti. In the 1780s, he set up a trading post, married a Potawatomi woman, and laid the foundation of the city. The “first family of Chicago” was Black and Indigenous. Sorry Ted, your pioneer fantasy just failed the midterm. Lesson two: Haiti’s Revolution (1791–1804). Enslaved Africans defeated Napoleon, declared the first free Black republic, and left France so broke it sold the Louisiana Territory to the U.S. Without Haiti, no Louisiana Purchase. Without the Purchase, no Chicago. That’s not “woke math” that’s arithmetic. Lesson three: Slavery financed Northern cities. By 1860, cotton picked by enslaved Africans made up nearly 60% of U.S. exports. Chicago’s warehouses, railroads, and banks thrived on that money. So no, enslaved people weren’t stacking bricks in Chicago but their labor paid for the bricks. Lesson four: Black labor built modern Chicago. From laying tracks and working stockyards to the Great Migration that created Bronzeville, Black hands built and rebuilt this city in every era. So when Cruz sneers, “Which slaves built Chicago?” the answer is simple: a Black Haitian founder, his Potawatomi wife, a Haitian slave revolt, an economy built on slavery, and generations of Black workers. And here’s a note from the professor: I’m not even Black. By America’s usual logic, I could shrug and say, “Doesn’t affect me.” But I do care. Because the more you learn, the more you understand and once you understand, you can’t unsee the truth. When you erase Black and Indigenous people from this story, you’re not just erasing them. You’re erasing America’s actual history. That’s not extra credit, Senator... that’s the whole course. Final exam: Chicago wasn’t built by rugged white settlers. It was built by the very people America enslaved, exploited, and then tried to erase from the story. Class dismissed. Senator Ted Cruz you didn’t just fail... you managed to drop the course, lose the textbook, and flunk summer school. Sauce: https://notsaintsnotsaviors.substack.com/p/which-slaves-built-chicago
item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.title: Yaaaaay!
item.description: I hope he suffers. Edit: He used to make my sister and me shower together as tweens, then burst into our rooms when we were still naked trying to get dressed. I put a lock on my bedroom door and it pissed him off so he removed my doorknob and I wasn't allowed to have one. My youngest sister (his daughter) moved in with him when she was 18 and he got drunk and tried to rape her saying, "You're my daughter, I can do whatever I want with you." He was wasted enough that she got away easily and she moved out that night. When she and my other sister (both his daughters) were very young and he got joint custody of them, he would crawl into bed with them in the middle of the night in nothing but his underwear and tell them he was lonely and couldn't sleep alone. When I was about nine or ten he was pummeling our mom and the neighbors called the cops. My sister and I tried to tell them what he's been doing and they said, "Be quiet, let the adults talk." Our mom denied that he was abusing her and they just left. We had it drilled into our heads not to talk to school counselors or else we'd be taken from our mom and never see her again. https://youtu.be/WMgpAq4JJB8?si=mECiPxQhZGR0Jv_V
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.dc:creator: SquaresNews

item.title: This is America
item.description: Note: I’m not tagging this as politics because this is now relevant to everyone who isn’t openly MAGA. Anyone of us can be disappeared by ICE, or the gangsters posing as ICE, there is no way for an ordinary citizen to tell the difference. Your trip to the hardware store can turn into a months long stay in some ICE facility. We are at the stage where going outside the house requires planning and preparation. If our rights can be taken away by an administration, then they weren’t really rights to begin with. (I’m fucking that quote up but I’m too pissed to look for it) I gotta do some planning of my own because I will be in the Chicago area for unrelated reasons. Stay safe out there.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.102 TOASTY
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Mike del Mundo
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Know - Supertask YouTube: https://youtu.be/shMPFajJarI?si=0Y9mpD_fnt7BEr3B Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0HEu14NJFAeeynHEboFTDP?si=2a768b109ffb4f88

Galmesh Rosewood
Rachid Lotf
plarium
Choi Jin Seok
Mateusz Majewski
HyperV0id
Maximiliano Moretto
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
